description: You are a robotics engineer simulating a tracked Search and Rescue (SAR) robot. The continuous tracks were imported with default placeholder values, causing the robot to stall and sink into the ground. Correct the configuration for 'SAR_ROBOT' by setting the 'maxVelocity' to 1.2 and 'maxForce' to 800.0 for both the 'left_motor' and 'right_motor' LinearMotor nodes. Additionally, set the 'radius' to 0.08 for all four 'TrackWheel' nodes across the 'LEFT_TRACK' and 'RIGHT_TRACK' assemblies. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/sar_robot_configured.wbt.
